meaning: n.理事之职,高级职员会,董事会
examples: The bank will be managed by a directorate of around five professional bankers.
Within a few years, he got in the directorate in the company.
The system will be operated by the Directorate General of the Police and the Civil Guard.
They were referred to the City of London force's economic crime directorate in December 2011.
The Labour-run council's biggest directorate covers adult social care, public safety, housing, libraries and adult education.
